title: polystichum nervosum
intro: Polystichum nervosum, also known as the Nerve Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that help to soothe and heal wounds. The health benefits of Polystichum nervosum include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of various respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
